name: Carbon Gel
shortDescription: Professional carbon gel for ND:YAG laser carbon peeling treatments. Deep cleansing, pore tightening, for oily and problematic skin.
description:
The Carbon Gel is a cosmetic product specially developed for Q-switch ND:YAG laser carbon peeling treatments.

The gel spreads evenly on the skin and after drying penetrates into the pores. The laser targets and heats the carbon particles in the gel, which effectively remove impurities, stimulate collagen production, and aid skin tightening.

Specifically recommended for oily, acne-prone, uneven-textured, and dull skin.
metaTitle: Carbon Gel | For carbon peeling treatments
metaDescription: Professional carbon gel for ND:YAG laser carbon peeling treatments. Deep cleansing, pore tightening, skin firming effect.

final.headline: Need carbon gel?
final.subtitle: Order directly, or feel free to ask!

faq.question: Which lasers can the carbon gel be used with?
faq.answer: The carbon gel is specifically designed for carbon peeling treatments with Q-switch ND:YAG lasers. It is compatible with all ND:YAG lasers that have 1064 nm or 1320 nm wavelengths.

faq.question: How should it be applied?
faq.answer: Clean the skin, then apply a thin layer of gel to the face. Wait until it dries completely (5–10 minutes), then perform the laser carbon peeling treatment. After treatment, remove any remaining gel and apply moisturizer.
